{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323012932FA4CB02B09D79D9061F3"}"},"total":1318},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7405964763067155262","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"虽说，许多人物和事情都写得有点夸张和实际不符合，但是也非常不错特别是和青总在一起的时候，是这本小说的亮点，希望作者能再接再厉，写的时候不要把人物和事情写得太夸张了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1724339120,"group_id":"7348349780457688089","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/hoTTn5upF+v5wTVn1jrGgBmHgHN2hGGpgU8cl0QK0F","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/150f7573a0e14f94b882b43ee407612c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791629&x-signature=7uQjaRIXMYw2V1z%2F%2B%2FvM6745Ofc%3D","user_id":"3126617769782120","user_name":"这不得哈下气"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3126617769782120","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7348349780457688089","book_info":{"abstract":"林茂穿越星铁世界，身患崩坏病无药可救。
但却意外觉醒系统并且受邀加入聊天群。
看着聊天群里一个个熟悉的名字，崩坏病的治疗方法也有了眉目。
先是长空市的空之律者琪亚娜。
后是蒙德城解决龙灾的粉色妖精小姐。
通过系统林茂疯狂的从群友身上爆金币。
琪亚娜的胃、怪力、卡斯兰娜枪斗术……
空之律者核心、始源之律者核心……
林茂的力量一步步变强。
同时……
“这不是你总是委托我见芽衣的吗？”
“这就是你把我的芽衣给抢走的理由？”
林茂微微一笑。
“骚瑞，连你我也一块带走！”
“……”

注：大量变身情节（附身情节）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/a98f24c2bf9fd5a8d1fda8363f610665","author":"五股辫","author_id":"","book_id":"7348349780457688089","book_name":"星铁：都是熟人爆点金币不过分吧","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302858","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7353189152239649305","read_count":"32955","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2746566"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.4","serial_count":"1250","tags":"动漫衍生,系统,穿越,二次元,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/8e2c68d023f9c2afad0fefbbbc71cd78~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779384572&x-signature=X%2BNnDXiOl0BTgeVJng0LgZXFIzQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3175836489887437","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"133"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323012932FA4CB02B09D79D9061F3"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":3348,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":29170,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":7621},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7572058741913748248","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看，就主打一个欢乐，欢乐还是欢乐。反正男主不去当欢愉令使或者取代欢愉都可惜了。而且把很多会发生的悲剧，以一种玩乐，悠闲，欢乐，等等给弥补，挺不错的。而且男主的形象[捂脸][捂脸][捂脸]塑造的很好，就是挺抽象。
说说扣一星的理由吧。最主要的理由其实就一点，没有主线推进。原神后面还有那么多地方，崩坏也是也有很多剧情，崩铁一样也是还有很多剧情。结果呢在仙舟活生生写了四五百章。每天不是互怼就是玩梗，要么就是疯里疯气的。结束呢四五百章只写了才几天的内容。就感觉，被定格了一样，看多了容易枯燥的。一边推主线，然后去另一个世界游玩，弥补遗憾等等这会很棒的。而不是像现在酱紫，一直在仙舟互怼。
以上是个人的看法。当然就整体来说是一本很欢乐很有趣的小说。很推荐一看。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1763011033,"group_id":"7348349780457688089","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/9Y7F+UZtlJlbUrJihxpro=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/fb7e3d4af10d4176a827c0c6153ef364~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793655&x-signature=P0t6ZmNNQwT6CO50%2FdoNFG0Eetw%3D","user_id":"409480066508750","user_name":"希耀　"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"409480066508750","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7348349780457688089","book_info":{"abstract":"林茂穿越星铁世界，身患崩坏病无药可救。
但却意外觉醒系统并且受邀加入聊天群。
看着聊天群里一个个熟悉的名字，崩坏病的治疗方法也有了眉目。
先是长空市的空之律者琪亚娜。
后是蒙德城解决龙灾的粉色妖精小姐。
通过系统林茂疯狂的从群友身上爆金币。
琪亚娜的胃、怪力、卡斯兰娜枪斗术……
空之律者核心、始源之律者核心……
林茂的力量一步步变强。
同时……
“这不是你总是委托我见芽衣的吗？”
“这就是你把我的芽衣给抢走的理由？”
林茂微微一笑。
“骚瑞，连你我也一块带走！”
“……”
